note: AI-generated art for Crabby World, produced with Higgsfield using the creator's own hybrid-crab photo collection (Google Drive 'Crabs' folder) as character references. Sprites are generated on solid key-colour backgrounds and chroma-keyed at runtime by the game. If a URL is unreachable the game falls back to its built-in code-drawn art. Per-state ANIMATION FRAMES (idle/walk/jump/fall/claw/hurt and the grey crab's reclaim) have their own manifest and prompt recipe in assets/animations.json.
style_formula: chunky 16-bit pixel art with painterly shading, classic SNES platformer feel, rounded bouncy shapes with thick dark-chocolate outlines, environments in lush layered jungle greens and sky blues, hero in warm pineapple-yellow with leafy green crown and red watermelon accents contrasting the surroundings, enemies in muted stony greys, pickups glowing watermelon-red and gold, hopeful sunny storybook atmosphere with soft depth haze, high contrast between game elements and backgrounds, clean readable silhouettes, consistent side-view perspective across all assets

assets.role: title screen key art (embedded in index.html as a data URI; tap-to-start)
assets.source: creator-provided voxel Crabby World title image

assets.role: HOME scene backdrop (Pip's beach house) — TODO: generate 16:9 in Higgsfield and put the URL in the HOME_BG constant (or save to assets/backgrounds/home.png). Falls back to a hand-drawn room until then.
assets.prompt: game background of a wide side-scrolling platformer stage showing a cutaway of Pip's pineapple beach house at sunrise, house interior on the left with a leaf-bed, a table of watermelon snacks, shells and homely clutter, and an open doorway leading onto a bright tropical path with palm trees and sea in the distance continuing off the right edge, flat walkable ground across the bottom, wide side-view, chunky 16-bit pixel art with painterly shading, SNES platformer feel, thick dark-chocolate outlines, lush jungle greens and sky blues, no characters, no UI, full 16:9 rectangular frame, no round framing

assets.role: vine crab enemy sprite (used for the leafy crab kind)
